tickets.subject: Cannot login to account
tickets.description: I keep getting an error when trying to login. The password reset email is not arriving either. I have tried multiple times.

tickets.subject: Production down - critical outage
tickets.description: Our production environment is completely down. All users are affected. This is a critical emergency requiring immediate attention.

tickets.subject: Charged twice for subscription
tickets.description: I was charged twice this billing cycle. I need a refund for the duplicate charge and an updated invoice.

tickets.subject: Request: add bulk export feature
tickets.description: It would be very helpful to have a bulk CSV export feature. Many of our team members have requested this improvement.

tickets.subject: Bug report: wrong total in invoice
tickets.description: Steps to reproduce: 1) Go to billing 2) View invoice 3) Total is incorrect. Expected: $100. Actual: $150. This is a regression from last release.

tickets.subject: 2FA code not received
tickets.description: I am not receiving my two-factor authentication code via SMS. I cannot access my account. This is blocking my work.

tickets.subject: App crashes when opening settings
tickets.description: Every time I navigate to the settings page the application crashes with an error. I have tried reinstalling but the bug persists.

tickets.subject: Please add dark mode
tickets.description: Dark mode would be a nice-to-have cosmetic feature. No rush, just a suggestion for future improvements.

tickets.subject: Security vulnerability found
tickets.description: I found a potential security issue in the API. Sensitive data may be exposed. This needs immediate attention as it is a critical security risk.

tickets.subject: How do I upgrade my plan?
tickets.description: I want to upgrade my subscription plan but I cannot find the option in the billing settings. Can you guide me through the process?

tickets.subject: Timeout errors on API calls
tickets.description: We are experiencing frequent connection timeout errors when making API calls during peak hours. This is severely impacting our integration.

tickets.subject: Request for SAML SSO integration
tickets.description: Our enterprise team would love to have SAML SSO integration. This feature is important for our security compliance requirements.

tickets.subject: Incorrect balance displayed
tickets.description: The balance shown in my account does not match my actual balance. Steps: login, go to dashboard. Wrong result is shown consistently.

tickets.subject: Password reset link expired too quickly
tickets.description: The password reset link I received via email expired before I could use it. The expiry time seems too short. Please extend it.

tickets.subject: General feedback on the product
tickets.description: I wanted to share some general feedback about using your platform. Overall it is good but there are some areas that could be improved.

tickets.subject: Duplicate charges on credit card
tickets.description: I see three separate charges on my credit card for the same subscription period. This is an urgent billing issue that needs immediate resolution.

tickets.subject: 500 Internal Server Error on reports page
tickets.description: Every time I try to access the reports page I get a 500 Internal Server Error. This has been happening for two days now.

tickets.subject: Add webhook notifications feature
tickets.description: We would like webhook support so we can integrate with our internal systems. This integration would greatly improve our workflow automation.

tickets.subject: Account was hacked - security emergency
tickets.description: I believe my account has been compromised. I am seeing activity I did not initiate. This is a security emergency. Please lock my account immediately.

tickets.subject: Minor cosmetic issue in UI
tickets.description: There is a very minor alignment issue in the navigation bar. It is purely cosmetic and does not affect functionality. Just flagging it.
